biological_role: Generalized coding sequence (open reading frame) detection.
Detection of non-coding internal gene segments (eukaryotic).
Detection of the splice site at the start of an intron.
Detection of the splice site at the end of an intron.
Activates on frameshifts or premature stop codons.
Structural motif detector for alpha-helical protein folds.
Structural motif detector for beta-sheet protein folds.
Activates on prophage regions and viral genomic insertions.
Identified in initial Antarctic benchmark as a high-confidence outlier.
Potential promoter or regulatory element detector.
Internal model logic for sequence directionality.
